testcase.name: TC04 - Budget Homes listings display prices within ceiling and EMI Calculator computes correctly
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page................passed When the user clicks the Buy heading........................................passed And the user clicks "Budget Homes"..........................................passed And the user switches to the new tab........................................passed Then the first 5 property prices should be displayed........................passed When the user clicks on the first property listing..........................passed And the user switches to the property detail tab............................passed And the user clicks the Apply Loan button...................................passed And the user switches to the loan calculator tab............................passed And the user enters loan amount "30,00,000" and interest rate "7.5".........passed And the user selects property not finalized radio button....................passed And the user clicks Calculate EMI...........................................passed Then the EMI details should be displayed....................................passed
